title: nabalus altissimus
intro: Nabalus altissimus, also known as Tall Rattlesnake Root, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nabalus altissimus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a treatment for fever and skin conditions. Nabalus altissimus can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
